name: InfraNodus MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from InfraNodus for mapping text into knowledge graphs — creating structured network representations of concepts and their relationships. Enables AI agents to analyze text, discover key themes, find gaps in thinking, and explore semantic connections through graph-based text analysis.
use_cases: Mapping research documents into knowledge graphs for pattern discovery agents
Identifying key themes and structural gaps in text corpora from analysis agents
Building concept maps from conversations and documents for knowledge synthesis agents
Exploring semantic relationships between ideas for research and writing agents
not_for: Simple keyword search (this is graph-based semantic analysis)
Real-time chat or messaging analysis at scale
Teams needing raw NLP without graph visualization
best_when: A researcher, writer, or analyst wants AI agents to map their documents, notes, or research into knowledge graphs — discovering conceptual patterns, blind spots, and semantic connections.
avoid_when: You need simple text search or keyword extraction. InfraNodus provides unique graph-based analysis — use when structural relationships between concepts matter.

auth.notes: InfraNodus API key required. Free and paid tiers available. API key obtained from InfraNodus account.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited analyses per month; paid for higher volume
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid tiers for more analyses and advanced features
pricing.notes: InfraNodus has free and paid tiers. MCP server is official from InfraNodus.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by InfraNodus API tier; free tier has usage limits

known_agent_gotchas: InfraNodus graph analysis results require understanding of network metrics (betweenness centrality, etc.)
Free tier limits may constrain heavy agent use — check current tier limits
Text sent to InfraNodus is processed by their cloud service — check data privacy terms
Official MCP from InfraNodus — good quality but niche audience
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Text content is sent to InfraNodus cloud for graph analysis. Review InfraNodus privacy policy before processing sensitive documents. EU-based service.

security_score_components.security_notes: Content sent to InfraNodus cloud. EU-based. Review privacy policy for sensitive document processing.
